title: Marjane smuutikauss
ingredients: Assorted fresh fruits, berries, seeds, and nuts for topping
instructions: Rinse buckwheat and soak overnight in water.
Slice banana and freeze (or use a regular banana if unprepared).
In the morning, rinse buckwheat through a strainer until clean.
Blend buckwheat, frozen banana, blackcurrants, and chia seeds until thick.
Add water gradually to reach desired consistency.
Pour thick smoothie into bowls.
Top with sliced fresh fruits, berries, chopped nuts, and coconut flakes.
notes: You can soak a larger batch of buckwheat at once and refrigerate it — it keeps for several days for convenient mornings.
description: Alusta hommikut õigel lainel, siis on terve päev hea hoog sees! See rikkalik kauss annab sulle vajaliku koguse vitamiine, süsivesikuid, rasvu ja valke.
descriptionEn: Start your morning on the right wavelength, and you'll have good momentum throughout the day. This nutrient-dense bowl provides you with the necessary vitamins, carbohydrates, fats, and proteins.

title: Suitsulohe
instructions: Peel carrots and bury them in salt in a small baking dish. Bake at 180°C for 1.5 hours.
Remove from oven, brush away salt with a pastry brush, and let cool on paper towels.
Combine marinade ingredients (olive oil, liquid smoke, vinegar). Cut nori into small strips.
Slice carrots thinly using a cheese knife, peeler, or mandoline.
Layer carrot slices in a container, brushing each layer with marinade and sprinkling nori pieces between layers.
Let marinate for 24 hours.
When serving on sandwiches, season with lemon juice and fresh dill.
notes: Adjust baking time by 10 minutes based on carrot size. Choose medium-sized carrots for best results. Alternatively, mix sliced carrots gently with marinade in a bowl instead of layering.
description: Kui ahjuporgandit õigesti maitsestada, on tulemuseks suitsulõhe analoog ehk suitsulohe. See sobib hästi võileivale, sushi sisse, salatitesse ja bowlide lisandiks.
descriptionEn: When roasted carrots are properly seasoned, the result is a smoked salmon substitute. It works well on sandwiches, in sushi, salads, and as a bowl topping.

title: Pannkoogid
ingredients: 1 tsp vanilla sugar or 0.5 tsp vanilla paste
1 tsp psyllium husk or ground flaxseeds
instructions: Mix yogurt with baking soda, baking powder, vinegar, psyllium, and chia seeds; let sit briefly.
Mash banana into a puree.
Combine almond flour, wheat flour, corn flour, and starch in a bowl.
Add banana, soy milk, and yogurt mixture; blend thoroughly.
Heat coconut oil in a pan; pour 4–5 portions with spacing between them.
When edges bubble, flip gently with a spatula.
Serve with preferred toppings.
notes: Best results when you let the batter rest 30 minutes in the fridge. Batter should be thick to prevent spreading; adjust with flour or soy milk as needed.
description: Keda jätaksid ükskõikseks pannkoogid!? Varusta end erinevate lisanditega, sest need koogid on liiga maitsvad selleks, et midagi järgi jääks.
descriptionEn: Who could resist pancakes? Prepare various toppings, because these cakes are too delicious to leave anything behind.

title: Šokolaadine smuutikauss
ingredients: Various fruits, berries, nuts, and seeds for topping
instructions: Blend all base ingredients together until uniform.
Adjust consistency by gradually adding milk as needed.
Pour mixture into a bowl.
Top with preferred fruits, crushed nuts, and seeds.
notes: Soak cashews in water overnight for a creamier texture. Choose raw cacao over regular cocoa to preserve vitamins and minerals.
description: Enam paremaks minna ei saa! Kõik head ja kasulikud asjad üheskoos annavad Sinu hommikule särtsaka alguse.
descriptionEn: Nothing could be better! All the good and beneficial ingredients together give your morning a sparkling start.

title: Vürtsikas kilutaim
instructions: Use a mandoline to cut eggplants into 2–3mm thick slices. Stack them and boil in a pot with a lid for ~10 minutes until slightly translucent.
Strain through a colander and rinse thoroughly with cold water. Keep slices stacked to prevent separation.
Once cooled, cut slices into quarters. Layer in a container with olive oil, sea salt, spice mixture, and bay leaf between each layer.
Ensure slices are not too wet; press gently or pat with paper towels if needed.
Ready after several hours. Serve on dark bread with green onions.
notes: For large eggplants, remove the seeded center after cooking. Without a mandoline, carefully cut 2mm slices with a sharp knife.
description: Kaval asendus klassikalisele vürtsikilule. Parim musta leiva ja rohelise sibulaga!
descriptionEn: A clever substitute for classic spiced kiluvõi. Best served with dark bread and green onions!

title: Banaanilootsikud
ingredients: Fresh fruit and berries to taste
instructions: Slice bananas lengthwise into halves.
Place banana halves on two plates.
Spread one teaspoon of peanut butter on each banana half.
Top with chopped nuts.
Add fresh berries and fruit as desired.
Garnish with fresh peppermint for added flavor.
notes: Works as breakfast, lunch, or a quick snack. For children, create fun shapes or faces with ingredients.
description: Kiire ja tervislik hommikueine või vahepala. Banaanilootsikud on lihtne viis nautida maitsvat ja toitvat suupistet.
descriptionEn: A quick and healthy breakfast or snack. Banana boats are a simple way to enjoy a tasty and nourishing bite.

title: Tofupirukad ja seenepirukad
titleEn: Tofu and Mushroom Puff Pastry Pies
instructions: Thaw puff pastry 2 hours prior or use fresh.
For tofu filling: finely chop onion and grate smoked tofu. Fry vegan mince in olive oil, add onion. Once mince thaws, add grated tofu and seasonings.
For mushroom filling: sauté mushrooms in olive oil with onion. Combine soft tofu, mayo, and seasonings, then add mushrooms.
Roll one pastry sheet to double size, cut into four squares. Place a generous spoonful of filling on each, fold diagonally. Press edges with a fork and transfer to baking sheet.
Optionally brush with plant milk.
Bake at 190–220°C for approximately 15 minutes until golden brown.
notes: Works with any puff pastry. Firm tofu works if soft tofu is unavailable.
description: Lehtaignast saad kiirelt valmistada igasugu pirukaid ja saiakesi. Need siin on soolased tofupirukad, mis meenutavad klassikalisi lihapirukaid.
descriptionEn: Puff pastry allows for quick preparation of various pastries. These are savory tofu pastries that resemble traditional meat pastries. You can also fill them with mushrooms instead.

title: Kikerherneomlett
instructions: Mix dry ingredients with seasonings, then add soy milk and vinegar. Stir until smooth and let rest while preparing filling.
Chop vegetables and lightly sauté in oil in a pan. Distribute evenly across the pan.
Pour batter over vegetables. Cover with lid and reduce heat. Let cook for several minutes.
Check if bottom is golden brown using a spatula. Cut omelette into smaller pieces and flip portions.
Add oil and heat, cooking a few more minutes. Avoid overcooking.
Garnish with fresh herbs and serve.
notes: Experiment with different vegetables. Optional: bake in oven at 200°C for ~15 minutes after sautéing filling. If omelette falls apart, reduce filling amount.
description: Lihtne kuid mitmekesine kerge hommikueine, mis peaks sobima ka kõige isutumasse hommikusse. Meeldib eriti lastele!
descriptionEn: A straightforward yet versatile light breakfast that should appeal even on the pickiest mornings. This recipe is particularly popular with children.
